scripts.setup: cd backend && mvn dependency:resolve && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev:sagemaker:stop: if [ -f .dev-sagemaker.pids ]; then while IFS= read -r pid; do kill -- "-$pid" 2>/dev/null || kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; done < .dev-sagemaker.pids; rm -f .dev-sagemaker.pids; echo 'Stopped'; else echo 'No running processes found'; fi
